title: Manchego Tartlets with Caramelized Onions
description: A simple and flavorful appetizer or snack featuring caramelized onions, Manchego cheese, and a crumbly tart crust.

ingredients.name: 1 sheet frozen puff pastry, thawed
ingredients.notes: kept chilled until ready to use

instructions: Roll out puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut out small squares, about 3 inches per side.
Transfer pastry squares to a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush edges with a little water.
Top each square with a spoonful of caramelized onions, a sprinkle of Manchego cheese, a drizzle of olive oil, and a sprinkle of thyme.
Fold pastry squares in half to form triangles, pressing edges to seal.
Brush tops with a little water and sprinkle with salt.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
